title: Tracking Issue for CNCF Incubation
body:
# Podman - CNCF Incubation Application

**Application for Incubation:** [Sandbox Application #309](https://github.com/cncf/sandbox/issues/309)

This document tracks Podman's progress toward CNCF Incubation and provides evidence for each requirement.

---

## Application Process Principles

| Requirement                                                 | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| ----------------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Engage with domain specific TAG                             | ✅      | [TAG-Runtime Meeting Notes](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1k7VNetgbuDNyIs_87GLQRH2W5SLgjgOhB6pDyv89MYk/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.s485wlw1do6e) - Completed TAG walkthrough presentation |
| TAG provides insight/recommendation in context of landscape | ✅      | [TAG-Runtime Meeting Notes](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1k7VNetgbuDNyIs_87GLQRH2W5SLgjgOhB6pDyv89MYk/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.s485wlw1do6e) - TAG provided feedback during review    |
| All project metadata and resources are vendor neutral       | ✅      | Project hosted under [github.com/containers](https://github.com/containers) organization with multi-vendor governance                                                                        |
| Review and ack expectations for Sandbox                     | ✅      | [Sandbox acceptance](https://github.com/cncf/sandbox/issues/309)                                                                                                                             |
| Due Diligence Review                                        | ⏳      | Pending TOC assignment                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Additional docs as appropriate                              | ⏳      | In progress                                                                                                                                                                                  |

---

## Governance

| Requirement                                            | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Clear and discoverable governance documentation        | ✅      | [GOVERNANCE.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/GOVERNANCE.md)                                                                                                                                                        |
| Document complete list of current maintainers          | ✅      | [MAINTAINERS file](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/MAINTAINERS) with names, contact info, and affiliations                                                                                                            |
| Appropriate number of active maintainers               | ✅      | [Contributors Graph](https://github.com/containers/podman/graphs/contributors) - 798+ contributors, multi-company maintainer team                                                                                                   |
| Code and Doc ownership matches governance roles        | ✅      | [CODEOWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/.github/CODEOWNERS) aligned with MAINTAINERS                                                                                                                             |
| Document adoption of CNCF Code of Conduct              | ✅      | [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) references CNCF CoC                                                                                                                    |
| CNCF Code of Conduct cross-linked from governance docs | ✅      | Cross-linked in [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) and README                                                                                                                         |
| All subprojects listed                                 | ✅      | Subprojects documented: [Podman Desktop](https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop), [Buildah](https://github.com/containers/buildah), [Skopeo](https://github.com/containers/skopeo), [crun](https://github.com/containers/crun) |

---

## Contributors

| Requirement                                         | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| --------------------------------------------------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Clearly defined process to submit issues or changes | ✅      | [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md), [Submitting Issues & PRs](https://podman.io/community#submitting-issues--pull-requests)                                                                        |
| At least one public communications channel          | ✅      | [Matrix (#podman:matrix.org)](https://matrix.to/#/#podman:matrix.org), [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/podman), [IRC (#podman on libera.chat)](https://libera.chat/), [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/containers/podman/discussions) |
| List all project communication channels             | ✅      | [Community page](https://podman.io/community) - Matrix, Discord, IRC, GitHub Discussions, Mailing List                                                                                                                                           |
| Up-to-date public meeting schedules                 | ✅      | [Podman Community Meetings](https://podman.io/community#podman-community-meetings) - Regular Community Meeting & Cabal with recordings and minutes                                                                                               |
| Documentation of how to contribute                  | ✅      | [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md), [PR Submission Details](https://podman.io/community#submitting-pull-requests)                                                                                   |
| Demonstrate contributor activity and recruitment    | ✅      | [Contribution Stats](https://github.com/containers/podman/pulse), [DevStats](https://podman.devstats.cncf.io/), contributors from Red Hat, SUSE, Amadeus, Motorola Solutions, NTT, IBM, Debian                                                    |

---

## Engineering Principles

| Requirement                                | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                                         |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Document project goals and differentiation | ✅      | [README - Why Podman?](https://github.com/containers/podman#overview-and-scope) - Daemonless, rootless containers differentiating from Docker                   |
| Document what the project does and why     | ✅      | [Podman.io Documentation](https://podman.io/docs), [Getting Started Guide](https://podman.io/get-started)                                                        |
| Public roadmap or forward-looking planning | ✅      | [GitHub Projects Board](https://github.com/orgs/containers/projects), [Release Planning](https://github.com/containers/podman/milestones)                        |
| Overview of project architecture           | ✅      | [Architecture Documentation](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/design), [Cloud Native Use Cases](https://podman.io/docs/podman-for-kubernetes) |
| Document the release process               | ✅      | [Release Process](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/RELEASE_PROCESS.md), [Release Notes](https://github.com/containers/podman/releases)           |

---

## Security

| Requirement                                       | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                   |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Clearly defined process to report security issues | ✅      | [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/security/policy)                                                                        |
| Enforcing Access Control Rules                    | ✅      | [Branch protection rules](https://github.com/containers/podman/settings/branches) - 2FA required, signed commits, review requirements     |
| Document security response roles                  | ✅      | [Security Policy](https://github.com/containers/podman/security/policy) documents security team and response process                       |
| Security Self-Assessment                          | ✅      | [Podman Security Self-Assessment](https://github.com/cncf/toc/blob/main/projects/podman-containers/security-assessment/self-assessment.md) |
| OpenSSF Best Practices passing badge              | ✅      | [OpenSSF Best Practices Badge](https://www.bestpractices.dev/projects/10499) - 100% compliance                                            |

---

## Ecosystem

| Requirement                                | Status | Evidence                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------------------------ | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Publicly documented list of adopters       | ✅      | [ADOPTERS.md](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/ADOPTERS.md)                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Used by at least 3 independent adopters    | ✅      | Notable adopters include: Red Hat (OpenShift/RHEL), SUSE, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, multiple enterprise users                                                                                                                                     |
| TOC verification of adopters               | ⏳      | Pending TOC review                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Documented integrations with CNCF projects | ✅      | [Kubernetes CRI-O integration](https://cri-o.io/), [Prometheus metrics](https://github.com/containers/prometheus-podman-exporter), [OCI/containerd compatibility](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/source/markdown/podman.1.md) |

---

## Additional Evidence

### Community Health Metrics

* **GitHub Stars:** 29,900+
* **Forks:** 2,900+
* **Contributors:** 798+
* **Commits:** 26,377+
* **Releases:** 233
* **Used By:** 170+ organizations including UiPath, OpenShift, DataDog

### Production Usage

* Default container runtime in RHEL 8+, Fedora, CentOS Stream
* Integrated in GitHub Actions and GitLab CI runners
* Used by major cloud providers for serverless container workloads

### Vendor Diversity

Contributors from multiple organizations including:

* Red Hat
* SUSE
* Amadeus
* Motorola Solutions
* NTT
* IBM
* Debian

---

## References

* **Project Website:** https://podman.io
* **Main Repository:** https://github.com/containers/podman
* **Documentation:** https://podman.io/docs
* **CNCF Sandbox Application:** [Sandbox Application #309](https://github.com/cncf/sandbox/issues/309)
* **CNCF DevStats:** https://podman.devstats.cncf.io/
* **CNCF Project Lifecycle:** https://contribute.cncf.io/projects/lifecycle/
* **OpenSSF Badge:** [OpenSSF Best Practices](https://www.bestpractices.dev/projects/10499)
* **Security Self-Assessment:** https://github.com/cncf/toc/blob/main/projects/podman-containers/security-assessment/self-assessment.md

---

_Last Updated: December 2025_

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Governance is done, though it looks like we should add a list of subprojects to be truly complete (so Buildah and Skopeo would have to be linked from our governance doc).
@castrojo can you take a look please.
@castrojo I added evidence etc - if you can take a look
